mapper.sql: pc.id, pc.plan_id, pc.community_id, pc.release_date_begin, pc.release_date_end, pc.barrier_required_qty, pc.frame_required_qty, pc.release_status, pc.created_at, pc.updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT , p.plan_no, p.plan_name, p.customer, p.release_status as plan_release_status, c.community_no, c.building_name, c.building_address, c.city FROM plan_community pc LEFT JOIN plan p ON pc.plan_id = p.id LEFT JOIN community c ON pc.community_id = c.id WHERE pc.id = #{id}

SELECT , p.plan_no, p.plan_name, p.customer, p.release_status as plan_release_status, c.community_no, c.building_name, c.building_address, c.city FROM plan_community pc LEFT JOIN plan p ON pc.plan_id = p.id LEFT JOIN community c ON pc.community_id = c.id ORDER BY pc.id DESC

SELECT , p.plan_no, p.plan_name, p.customer, p.release_status as plan_release_status, c.community_no, c.building_name, c.building_address, c.city FROM plan_community pc LEFT JOIN plan p ON pc.plan_id = p.id LEFT JOIN community c ON pc.community_id = c.id WHERE pc.plan_id = #{planId} ORDER BY pc.id DESC

SELECT , p.plan_no, p.plan_name, p.customer, p.release_status as plan_release_status, c.community_no, c.building_name, c.building_address, c.city FROM plan_community pc LEFT JOIN plan p ON pc.plan_id = p.id LEFT JOIN community c ON pc.community_id = c.id WHERE pc.community_id = #{communityId} ORDER BY pc.id DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO plan_community ( plan_id, community_id, release_date_begin, release_date_end, barrier_required_qty, frame_required_qty, release_status ) VALUES
(#{item.planId}, #{item.communityId}, #{item.releaseDateBegin}, #{item.releaseDateEnd}, #{item.barrierRequiredQty}, #{item.frameRequiredQty}, #{item.releaseStatus})
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM plan_community WHERE id IN
#{id}
